prompt_used: This is Hospital Archivist Nella Ward. Keep your channel open and do not answer unknown callbacks. A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m. Start with intake ledger photo, then verify every timestamp against decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing. If The Record Keeper contacts you directly, preserve the message before you react.
source_prompt: Story: Ward 1908 (ward-1908) | Hook: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m. | Subgenre: haunted institution | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing | Villain: The Record Keeper | Villain worldview: Unacknowledged harm repeats until the living pay attention. | Motifs: patient tags, flicker lights, stairwell echoes.
